title: calliandra haematomma var. minutifolia
intro: Calliandra haematomma var. minutifolia, also known as the coral powder puff or miniature coral powder puff, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Asia, characterized by its vibrant red and pink flowers and small, round leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Calliandra haematomma var. minutifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a powder or infusion to make tea, and it is also used in traditional folk remedies to treat various ailments.
